source_pr.title: ddl: fix owner get panic info  with dist-reorg
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/41208

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Add `references` to record the`reorgCtx` creating count.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Intermittent panic/nil-pointer behavior in dist-reorg/owner code paths due to concurrent creation/removal of the same reorgCtx (reorgCtxMap) for a job.
failure_signature: panic caused by concurrent removeReorgCtx/NewReorgCtx/setReorgCtxForBackfill on the same jobID (dist-reorg reorgCtxMap lifecycle)
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness/crash was caused by a race in async DDL reorg context management: the same jobID's reorgCtx could be created/used by multiple goroutines (e.g. backfill worker and reorg job) while another path removed it from reorgCtxMap, leading to invalid access/panic. The fix adds an atomic reference counter on reorgCtx, increments it on creation/reuse, and only deletes the map entry when the reference count drops to zero. A concurrent unit test (TestUsingReorgCtx) is added to exercise repeated SetReorgCtxForBackfill/NewReorgCtx/RemoveReorgCtx calls.
fix_pattern: Make reorgCtx lifecycle reference-counted (atomic Int32) so concurrent users cannot remove the context prematurely; add a concurrent regression test.

evidence: files: ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/job_table.go, ddl/reorg.go, ttl/ttlworker/BUILD.bazel

analysis:
PR title: ddl: fix owner get panic info  with dist-reorg
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/41217
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (6): ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/job_table.go, ddl/reorg.go, ttl/ttlworker/BUILD.bazel
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
